title: Pest control products - Canada.ca
content:
## Pest control products
Information on pesticide use, recalls and alerts, problem reporting and standards. Also find technical information on assessing pesticide health risks.

## Services and information

### Pesticide recalls and safety alerts
Access pesticide recalls and safety alerts.

### Report a pesticide problem
Report a problem with a pesticide.
Information on pesticides and their use at home, at work and for agriculture. Also get pest control tips.

### Meeting pesticide standards
Find out how pesticides are regulated in Canada.

### Pesticide science policy
Understand how the potential health risks of pesticide use are assessed in Canada.

### Pesticides compliance and enforcement
Find out about pesticides compliance and enforcement activities, results and resources for the public and regulated parties.
